eventsFunctions.description: Gives a percentage of similarity between two strings, good for small texts.
eventsFunctions.name: Text_Similarity_Comparison

eventsFunctions.description: Runs for each word and saves the largest percentage, best for moderation in large sentences.
eventsFunctions.name: Word_Detection

eventsFunctions.description: Compare the similarity between two strings, good for small sentences.
eventsFunctions.name: Function

eventsFunctions.description: Replace Words In Sentence, Good For Moderating Bad Words.
eventsFunctions.name: ReplaceWordInText

parameters.longDescription: Use one letter or sign like "#" because it will replace all the letters and having "##" would make the replacement 2x longer. "Hello" → "#####" or with "##" "Hello" → "###########".
parameters.name: ReplaceWith

eventsFunctions.description: Informs if a password is too weak.
eventsFunctions.name: PasswordCrackableTime

eventsFunctions.description: Generates Names For Players, Like (ShadowMan, DarkDuck, EpicPanda).
eventsFunctions.name: Function2

eventsFunctions.description: Word Count In Sentence (Hello There) - 2 Words.
eventsFunctions.name: Function3

inlineCode: for (let i = 0; i <= b.length; i++) dp[i] = [i];
for (let j = 0; j <= a.length; j++) dp[0][j] = j;
